name: Lyra
author: Project Lyra
description: The Lyra platform: the mod manager UI, zuxhook, nativeapp daemon, and its component mods (mods-tab, wifi-power, clock-date) all wrapped in a pretty bow.
changelog: Adds an uninstaller. Once installed, the tile reads Uninstall Project Lyra; relaunch it to remove Lyra and return the tile to the installer, so you can reinstall or delete it later.
